name: Skull Archfiend of Lightning
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>迅</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>じん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>雷</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>らい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>の<ruby lang="jp"><rb>魔</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ま</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>王</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>おう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>－スカル・デーモン
name_jp_tl: Demon King of Thunderclap - Skull Daemon
desc: Once per turn, during your Standby Phase, you must pay 500 LP (this is not optional), or this card is destroyed. When resolving an opponent's card effect that targets this card, roll a six-sided die and negate that effect if you roll a 1, 3, or 6, and if you do, destroy that card.
mnst_eff: Once per turn, during your Standby Phase, you must pay 500 LP (this is not optional), or this card is destroyed. When resolving an opponent's card effect that targets this card, roll a six-sided die and negate that effect if you roll a 1, 3, or 6, and if you do, destroy that card.
eff: Once per turn, during your Standby Phase, you must pay 500 LP (this is not optional), or this card is destroyed. When resolving an opponent's card effect that targets this card, roll a six-sided die and negate that effect if you roll a 1, 3, or 6, and if you do, destroy that card.

sets.set: Speed Duel GX: Duelists of Shadows

Negates the effects of Spell Cards
